title: Define Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI guidelines for Suco Home Improvement
description: Create and validate classifier guidelines for the Suco - Home Improvement Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI score so reviewers and the model share the same class definitions and decision criteria.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Initial guidelines work completed for Suco - Home Improvement / Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI; see story plx-e46f05 for validation and pushed version details.
